scripts.build: if [ "$VERCEL" = "1" ]; then cd auralink-ai/frontend && npm ci && npm run build; else cd auto-entry && npm ci && npm run setup && npm run build; fi
scripts.dev:auralink: cd auralink-ai/frontend && NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:8000 NEXT_PUBLIC_PUBLISHING_API_URL=http://localhost:8001 PUBLISHING_JWT_SECRET=dev-secret-change-in-production JWT_SECRET=dev-secret-change-in-production npm run dev
scripts.dev:synclyst: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "cd auralink-ai/backend && (.venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 || python3 -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000)" "cd auralink-ai/frontend && NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:8000 NEXT_PUBLIC_PUBLISHING_API_URL=http://localhost:8001 PUBLISHING_JWT_SECRET=dev-secret-change-in-production JWT_SECRET=dev-secret-change-in-production npm run dev"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,frontend,publishing -c blue,green,magenta "cd auralink-ai/backend && (.venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 || python3 -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000)" "cd auralink-ai/frontend && NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:8000 NEXT_PUBLIC_PUBLISHING_API_URL=http://localhost:8001 PUBLISHING_JWT_SECRET=dev-secret-change-in-production JWT_SECRET=dev-secret-change-in-production npm run dev" "cd auralink-ai/publishing && npm run dev:serve"
scripts.dev:all:https: concurrently -n backend,frontend,publishing -c blue,green,magenta "cd auralink-ai/backend && (.venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 || python3 -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000)" "cd auralink-ai/frontend && NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:8000 NEXT_PUBLIC_PUBLISHING_API_URL=http://localhost:8001 PUBLISHING_JWT_SECRET=dev-secret-change-in-production JWT_SECRET=dev-secret-change-in-production npm run dev:https:no-open" "cd auralink-ai/publishing && npm run dev:serve"
scripts.dev:all:clean: sh -c 'for port in 8000 8001 3000 3001; do for p in $(lsof -ti :$port 2>/dev/null); do kill -9 $p 2>/dev/null; done; done' && npm run dev:all
